rationale: The score is identical (7/10) across both versions, and the substance is unchanged: both flag the same gaps in people management, organizational-change leadership, and mobile-platform relevance, while crediting the same technical strengths and developer-tools experience. Nothing in the variant keys off the demographic signal.
